'''lakuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherworker|featherworker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherworker|featherworker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lakuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækichith|lækichith]] || [[word:lækichij|lækichij]] || [[word:lækichish|lækichish]] || [[word:lækichi|lækichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakukuchuth|lakukuchuth]] || [[word:lakukuchuj|lakukuchuj]] || [[word:lakukuchush|lakukuchush]] || [[word:lakukuchu|lakukuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakuchuth|lakuchuth]] || [[word:lakuchuj|lakuchuj]] || [[word:lakuchush|lakuchush]] || [[word:lakuchu|lakuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakufchuth|lakufchuth]] || [[word:lakufchuj|lakufchuj]] || [[word:lakufchush|lakufchush]] || [[word:lakufchuf|lakufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakuchuthu|lakuchuthu]] || [[word:lakuchuju|lakuchuju]] || [[word:lakuchushu|lakuchushu]] || [[word:lakuchuku|lakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakuchuth|lakuchuth]] || [[word:lakuchuj|lakuchuj]] || [[word:lakuchush|lakuchush]] || [[word:lakuchu|lakuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakuchuthul|lakuchuthul]] || [[word:lakuchujul|lakuchujul]] || [[word:lakuchushul|lakuchushul]] || [[word:lakuchukul|lakuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakuchuthuthu|lakuchuthuthu]] || [[word:lakuchujuju|lakuchujuju]] || [[word:lakuchushushu|lakuchushushu]] || [[word:lakuchuku|lakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakuchuthun|lakuchuthun]] || [[word:lakuchujun|lakuchujun]] || [[word:lakuchushun|lakuchushun]] || [[word:lakuchukun|lakuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakuchuthuoro|lakuchuthuoro]] || [[word:lakuchujuoro|lakuchujuoro]] || [[word:lakuchushuoro|lakuchushuoro]] || [[word:lakuchukuoro|lakuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
